exhibits.name: State Administrators/Agents for Service of Process
Franchise Agreement
exhibits.notes: 96 pages. Full franchise agreement with 20 articles and internal exhibits (A-H). Includes Affiliate Services Agreement (Exhibit G within FA), Confidentiality/Non-Competition Agreement (Exhibit D within FA), Guaranty (Exhibit F within FA), Training Liability Waiver (Exhibit H within FA).

exhibits.name: Table of Contents of Manuals
exhibits.notes: 283 total pages across 18 sections. Sections include: Introduction, YESCO Franchising, Pre-Opening Checklist, Pre-Opening Timetable, Management Package, Peer Coaching, Compliance, Training Requirements, Corporate Structure/Financing, Staffing, Office Policies, Office Operations, Equipment/Supplies/Software, Administration/Accounting, Reports/Audits, Marketing, Sales/Pricing, Vehicle Administration, Insurance, Trademarks, Resale/Transfer, Servizio.

exhibits.name: State-Specific Addenda
exhibits.notes: 9 states with both FDD and Franchise Agreement addenda (except VA and RI which have FDD addenda only). Key overrides include forum selection, choice of law, noncompete enforceability, general release limitations, termination protections, and jury trial waiver limitations.

exhibits.name: Sample Release of Claims
exhibits.notes: Template form. Governed by Utah law.

exhibits.name: Financial Statements
exhibits.notes: 3-year audited consolidated financial statements (2022-2024). Auditor: HBME, LLC (Bountiful, UT). Clean (unqualified) opinion. Includes balance sheets, income statements, cash flows, and 10 notes. Consolidates YESCO Canada ULC.

exhibits.name: Summary of Industry-Specific Laws
exhibits.notes: Sign industry licensing requirements across states.

exhibits.name: Existing and Former Franchisees
exhibits.notes: Lists all existing US and Canada franchisees with names, addresses, phone numbers, and territory/location counts as of Dec 31, 2024. Also lists signed-but-not-opened and former franchisees.

exhibits.name: Promissory Note
exhibits.notes: Secured promissory note form for YFS financing. Security interest in all business assets.

exhibits.name: Standard Renewal Addendum
exhibits.notes: Modifies franchise agreement for standard 5-year renewal terms. Includes general release requirement.

exhibits.name: Early Renewal Program Addendum
exhibits.notes: Modifies franchise agreement for early renewal 10-year extended term with tiered royalty program. 5 pages.

exhibits.name: State Effective Dates and Receipts
exhibits.notes: State registration effective dates and detachable acknowledgment receipts.
